title: Translate should preserve code, inline code, and links
why_this_case_exists: Markdown safety matters as much as language quality. This case verifies that translation updates text without corrupting technical structure.
setup: The repository is a Git repo.
The source file includes fenced code blocks, inline code, and Markdown links.

input.changed_source_block: 运行 `docplaybook init` 后，访问 [快速开始](./quick-start.md)。
input.surrounding_structure: fenced code block, inline code token, markdown link

expected: Only the changed human-language block is regenerated.
Inline code and link URLs are preserved.
should_not_happen: Code fences or code contents are rewritten.
Markdown links lose URLs or formatting.
